cases.given: a development build localizes one unit and explicitly preserves the unfinished unit from the source
a development build explicitly selects a draft localized unit and reports it as unresolved
a development build declares that more localization units may still be discovered while accounting for every currently known unit
a currently known localization unit is absent from the translation scope even though unfinished units could have preserved their source content
a release candidate contains a source-preserved or unfinished unit in its declared localization scope
all units are complete but the declared localization scope lacks human release approval
all units are complete but their current content revision differs from the revision a person approved
all currently known units are complete and approved but the declared localization population may still grow
the known localization population changed after a person approved the previous scope snapshot
the declared population is confirmed and all units in that scope are selected, complete, and approved for release
